=== mp_invert_matrix_large ===
INPUT r1=123456789abcdef10fedcba98765432100000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT r2=1111111111111111000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT s1=2222222222222222000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT s2=3333333333333333444444444444444400000000000000000000000000000000

=== mp_invert_matrix_128 ===
INPUT r1=0000000000000007000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT r2=0000000000000003000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT s1=0000000000000004000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
INPUT s2=0000000000000009000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
OUTPUT r1=d2d2d2d2d2d2d2d3d2d2d2d2d2d2d2d200000000000000000000000000000000
OUTPUT r2=0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f00000000000000000000000000000000
OUTPUT s1=1414141414141414141414141414141400000000000000000000000000000000
OUTPUT s2=dcdcdcdcdcdcdcdddcdcdcdcdcdcdcdc00000000000000000000000000000000
